title: beluttakaka malabarica
intro: Beluttakaka malabarica, also known as the Indian gentian or gentian of the Western Ghats, is a plant species belonging to the gentian family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Beluttakaka malabarica include its ability to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into decoctions, infusions, or powders, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
